nasb.text: After these things when the anger of King Ahasuerus had subsided, he remembered Vashti and what she had done and what had been decreed against her.

esv.text: After these things, when the anger of King Ahasuerus had abated, he remembered Vashti and what she had done and what had been decreed against her.

cnv.text: 這些事以後，亞哈隨魯王的怒氣消減了，就想念瓦實提和她所行的，以及怎樣降旨辦她的事。

ccb.text: 这事之后，亚哈随鲁王的怒气平息下来，就想起瓦实提和她的所作所为，并怎样降旨惩罚她的事。
